items.title: Eye on Africa: Fally Ipupa marks 20 years of career
items.summary: Congolese music star Fally Ipupa is marking 20 years in the industry with new albums and major concerts in Paris, celebrating a journey that took him from Kinshasa to becoming one of Africa’s most recognized artists, known for pioneering a modern take on Congolese rumba by blending it with R&B, pop and urban sounds. Clarisse Fortuné reports.

items.title: Eye on Africa: Migrants deported from US stuck in DRC
items.summary: After being quietly deported from the United States, 15 migrants from Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru told AFP on Wednesday that they endured a 27-hour flight in handcuffs and shackles before eventually arriving in the Democratic Republic of Congo, in a report by Emily Boyle.

items.title: Eye on Africa: Tanzania poll violence report
items.summary: The commission of inquiry into electoral violence in Tanzania released its report on Thursday, a document commissioned by President Samia Suluhu, re-elected with 97.66% of the vote, which has been rejected by the opposition but acknowledges that hundreds of demonstrators were killed in the aftermath of the presidential election, as reported by regional correspondent Bastien Renouil.

items.title: Orient Express train exhibition in Paris
items.summary: Finally, a legendary rail journey from Paris to Istanbul is in the spotlight as the Museum of Decorative Arts in Paris hosts an exhibition dedicated to the Orient Express, with France 2 taking a closer look, in a report brought to us by Nick Rushworth.

items.title: Warner Bros. takeover by Paramount
items.summary: HBO Max, Harry Potter and CNN could soon come under Paramount after Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders approved an $81 billion sale of the company on Thursday, bringing the long-running takeover saga closer to completion, though the deal still faces regulatory scrutiny and criticism from those concerned about its impact on media plurality, as Wassim Cornet reports from Los Angeles.

items.title: Lebanon - Israel: Truce extended by three weeks
items.summary: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend a ceasefire for three weeks, according to the White House, which hosted ambassadors from both countries, but fighting persists as Hezbollah, absent from the talks, has launched new waves of rockets and drones, while Israeli forces continue operations in southern Lebanon and strike Hezbollah targets, as Washington correspondent Fraser Jackson reported earlier.

items.title: Israeli fire kills five in Gaza
items.summary: Israeli airstrikes killed at least four Palestinians in Gaza on Thursday, while in a separate incident in the Israeli-occupied West Bank, a 15-year-old was shot and killed by Israeli soldiers during an army raid, according to Palestinian health officials. Caroline Baum reports.

items.title: Strait of Hormuz: Iran, US seize ships
items.summary: US President Donald Trump says he is not rushing into a peace agreement with Iran, downplaying concerns over Iranian small boats even after they seized two container ships in the Strait of Hormuz, and arguing that Tehran is unable to strike a deal due to divisions within its leadership, an accusation Iran has rejected. Elitsa Gadeva tells us more.

items.title: Israel, Lebanon extend ceasefire as Trump says ‘great chance’ for peace deal
items.summary: Israel and Lebanon extended their ceasefire by three weeks on Thursday following a meeting of officials from both sides at the White House. US President Donald Trump said he believed there was a "great chance" the two countries would agree on a peace deal, even though Israel and Hezbollah have accused each other of multiple violations of the original truce.

items.title: Hot pants: Tokyo government workers swap suits for shorts
items.summary: Tokyo's metropolitan government is encouraging staff to wear shorts to work to cut reliance on air conditioning, an official said Friday, as concerns grow over high energy costs linked to the Middle East War.

items.title: Guerre au Soudan : les civils soudanais affluent à Koufra, en Libye
items.summary: Depuis trois ans, la guerre fait rage au Soudan entre les forces armées du pays, l’armée régulière et un groupe de paramilitaires, les Forces de soutien rapide, causant le déplacement de millions de Soudanais. La Libye est leur second pays d’accueil derrière le Tchad. A Kufra, au sud-est libyen, à 250 kilomètres de la frontière soudanaise, entre 40 000 et 60 000 migrants soudanais sont installés, dans des campements ou dans la ville. Nos reporters Lilia Blaise et Hamdi Tlili sont allés sur place

translation.title: War in Sudan: Sudanese civilians flock to Koufra, Libya
translation.summary: For the past three years, war has raged in the Sudan between the country's armed forces, the regular army and a group of paramilitaries, the Rapid Support Forces, causing the displacement of millions of Sudanese. Libya is their second host country behind Chad. Our reporters Lilia Blaise and Hamdi Tlili went there

items.title: L'actu en dessin : pendant ce temps-là, dans le détroit d'Ormuz…
items.summary: Depuis près de deux mois et le déclenchement de la guerre contre l'Iran menée par les États-Unis et Israël, le trafic est à l'arrêt dans le détroit d'Ormuz, par où transitaient 20 % du pétrole et du gaz naturel liquéfié (GNL) mondiaux avant le conflit, mais qui est désormais soumis à un double blocus iranien et américain.

translation.title: The drawing news: during that time, in the Strait of Ormuz...
translation.summary: For nearly two months, and the outbreak of the war against Iran by the United States and Israel, trafficking has been stopped in the Strait of Ormuz, through which 20 per cent of the world's oil and liquefied natural gas (LNG) transited before the conflict, but which is now subject to a double Iranian and American blockade.

items.title: Lamine Yamal forfait pour la fin de saison avec Barcelone, mais attendu au Mondial
items.summary: Le FC Barcelone a confirmé que Lamine Yamal, contraint de quitter le terrain mercredi face au Celta Vigo, souffre d'une lésion du biceps fémoral de la jambe gauche. Le club précise toutefois que sa participation à la Coupe du monde n'est pas compromise.

translation.title: Lamine Yamal package for the end of season with Barcelona, but expected at the World Championship
translation.summary: FC Barcelona confirmed that Lamine Yamal, forced to leave the field on Wednesday in front of Celta Vigo, suffers from a lesion of the femoral biceps of the left leg. However, the club states that its participation in the World Cup is not compromised.

items.title: Trump annonce une prolongation de la trêve au Liban, les négociations au point mort avec l'Iran
items.summary: Le Liban et Israël ont ⁠prolongé de trois ​semaines le cessez-le-feu temporaire conclu entre les deux pays, a annoncé le président américain à l'issue ​d'une réunion à Washington entre des représentants des deux pays. Une annonce qui intervient alors que des doutes entourent le cessez-le-feu temporaire ​et les négociations entre les États-Unis et l'Iran.

translation.title: Trump announces an extension of the truce in Lebanon, the standstill negotiations with Iran
translation.summary: Lebanon and Israel extended the temporary ceasefire between the two countries by three weeks, announced the US President following a meeting in Washington between representatives of the two countries. An announcement that comes as doubts surround the temporary ceasefire and negotiations between the United States and Iran.

items.title: L'entreprise chinoise DeepSeek annonce un nouveau modèle d'intelligence artificielle
items.summary: Un an après avoir secoué le monde de l'intelligence artificielle (IA) en dévoilant un agent conversationnel bien plus économique que ses concurrents américains, le chinois DeepSeek a lancé vendredi un nouveau modèle d'IA plus performant et basé sur l'open source.

translation.title: Chinese company DeepSeek announces new model of artificial intelligence
translation.summary: One year after shaking the world of artificial intelligence (AI) by revealing a much more economical conversational agent than its American competitors, the Chinese DeepSeek launched on Friday a new, more efficient, open source-based AI model.

items.title: Après avoir parié sur la chute de Maduro, un militaire américain est inculpé pour fraude
items.summary: Soupçonné d'avoir utilisé des informations confidentielles pour parier sur l'intervention des États-Unis au Venezuela, un soldat américain a été inculpé pour fraude jeudi. Il avait empoché plus de 400 000 dollars en misant sur la chute de Nicolas Maduro et encourt jusqu'à 50 ans de prison.

translation.title: After betting on Maduro's fall, an American soldier is charged with fraud
translation.summary: Suspected of using confidential information to bet on the US intervention in Venezuela, an American soldier was charged with fraud on Thursday. He had seized more than $400,000 by betting on the fall of Nicolas Maduro and facing up to 50 years in prison.

items.title: En direct : à Chypre, l'UE se dit prête à "s'engager davantage" pour la paix au Moyen-Orient
items.summary: Alors que les négociations entre Washington et Téhéran semblent au point mort, les dirigeants européens, réunis à Chypre, ont affirmé vendredi vouloir s'engager davantage pour la désescalade au Moyen-Orient. À cette occasion, le président français Emmanuel Macron a de nouveau insisté sur la nécessaire stabilité au Liban, où le cessez-le-feu avec Israël a été prolongé de trois semaines. Suivez notre direct.

translation.title: Live: In Cyprus, the EU says it is ready to "commit more" to peace in the Middle East
translation.summary: While negotiations between Washington and Tehran seem to be stalled, the European leaders, meeting in Cyprus, said on Friday they wanted to commit themselves more to de-escalation in the Middle East. On that occasion, French President Emmanuel Macron again stressed the need for stability in Lebanon, where the ceasefire with Israel was extended by three weeks. Follow our direct.

items.title: À quelques mois du Mondial 2026, l'épidémie de rougeole s'intensifie dans les Amériques
items.summary: L'épidémie de rougeole s'intensifie sur le continent américain, principalement au Mexique, au Guatemala, aux États-Unis et au Canada, alerte jeudi l'Organisation panaméricaine de la santé. Les touristes qui se rendront en Amérique du Nord pour le Mondial 2026 de football sont appelés à la prudence et à se faire vacciner.

translation.title: A few months from the World 2026, measles epidemic is intensifying in the Americas
translation.summary: The measles epidemic is intensifying on the American continent, mainly in Mexico, Guatemala, the United States and Canada, alerts the Pan American Health Organization on Thursday. Tourists travelling to North America for World Football 2026 are called upon to be cautious and vaccinated.

items.title: La nouvelle reine de la pop francophone Theodora triomphe aux Flammes
items.summary: La chanteuse Theodora, ultra favorite de la quatrième édition des Flammes, a remporté cinq trophées dont celui d'artiste féminine de l'année jeudi, à Paris. Côté messieurs, c'est Gims, artiste le plus écouté en France en 2025, qui a remporté le prix de l'artiste masculin de l'année.

translation.title: The New Queen of Francophone Pop Theodora triumphs at Flames
translation.summary: Theodora, an ultra-favorite singer from the fourth edition of the Flames, won five trophies, including that of female artist of the year in Paris on Thursday. On the gentlemen side, Gims, the most listened artist in France in 2025, won the prize for the male artist of the year.

items.title: Mines dans le détroit d'Ormuz : coup de bluff ou réel danger ?
items.summary: Jeudi, le président américain Donald Trump a ordonné la destruction des bateaux iraniens posant des mines dans le détroit d'Ormuz et il a rajouté que les dragueurs américains avaient aussi reçu la consigne de déminer à vitesse grand V. Une question subsiste : est-on sûr que le régime iranien a miné le détroit ?

translation.title: Mines in the Strait of Ormuz: blow of bluff or real danger?
translation.summary: On Thursday, US President Donald Trump ordered the destruction of Iranian ships laying mines in the Strait of Ormuz and he added that American dredgers had also been instructed to demine at high speed V. One question remains: is it certain that the Iranian regime has undermined the strait?

items.summary: Bringing the second day of this year's Coachella to a close, K-Pop girl group Blackpink made history Saturday night when they became the first Asian act to ever headline the festival. items.title: سرعت رو به وخامت گذاشتن روابط تهران و ابوظبی، یک شریان حیاتی تجاری را تهدید می‌کند

translation.title: The pace of deteriorating relations between Tehran and Abu Dhabi threatens a vital commercial arteries

items.title: وزارت خارجه چین: کشتی توقیف‌شده ایرانی حامل «هدیه‌ای از چین» نبود

Twenty-two years ago, with the deployment of Xi Jinping, then Secretary-General of Zhejiang Province, the “millions of projects” focusing on the environmental rehabilitation of rural settlements were launched. Out of 34,000 villages in the province, only 4,000 have a better habitat. It was described as “a village after a village, which is full of garbage”. And the farmers described it as: “Getting up early and making money, counting it in the trash, spending it in the hospital.” It can be said that the remediation of the habitat environment was an urgent aspiration of the rural population of Zhejiang at the time. items.title: 韩正会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 6月5日，国家副主席韩正在北京会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团。 韩正表示，中美关系是当今世界最重要的双边关系之一。当前，中美关系处于关键历史节点。中美相互尊重、和平共处、合作共赢，不仅有利于两国，也有利于世界和平与发展。希望中美高级别二轨对话能不断汇聚两国有识之士的真知灼见，增进美国各界对中国的了解和理解，共同推动中美关系稳定、健康、可持续发展。 美方表示，美中高级别二轨对话有助于双方更好理解对方，为两国关系发展提供更多有益思路。中国经济发展令人钦佩，双方应加强贸易、投资等领域对话合作。

Han is saying that Chinese-American relations are one of the most important bilateral relations in the world today. Currently, US-China relations are at a critical historical node. Mutual respect, peaceful coexistence and co-operation between China and the United States are beneficial not only to both countries but also to world peace and development. It is to be hoped that the high-level second-track dialogue between China and the United States will continue to bring together the insights of knowledgeable people from the two countries, enhance understanding and understanding of China among the United States, and work together to promote stable, healthy and sustainable relations between China and the United States. items.title: 国务院印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》

The Circular states that the Fourth National Agricultural Survey is aimed at rural households in the People ' s Republic of China, including rural agricultural producers and other households; urban agricultural producers; agricultural production units; villagers ' committees; and town and town people ' s governments. The main elements of the census include agricultural production conditions, food and food production, new quality of agricultural productivity, basics of rural development, living conditions of rural residents, etc. The standard time of the census is 2400 hours on 31 December 2026, and the data for the period is annual 2026. items.title: 中央军委主席习近平签署命令 发布《军事设施建设条例》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 中央军委主席习近平日前签署命令，发布《军事设施建设条例》，自2025年8月1日起施行。 条例深入贯彻习近平强军思想，深入贯彻新时代军事战略方针，聚焦服务备战打仗，适应新的领导指挥体制和保障模式，科学规范军事设施建设的基本原则、管理体制、运行机制和工作制度，是军事设施建设工作的重要依据。 条例共11章63条，按照军委管总、战区主战、军种主建的总原则，围绕理顺建设链、管理链、监督链，重点从军事设施建设计划管理、项目审批、工程发包、勘察设计、施工管理、应急建设、安全保密、监督问责等方面，厘清管理权限，优化流程机制，固化实践成果，为提高军事设施建设质量效益和保障能力提供有力法治保障。

The text of the Working Procedures Provisions for the Discussion and Decision of the Members of the Party Groups is reproduced below. Article 1 of the working procedures for the discussion and decision of party membership matters (approved by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 29 November 2018 and issued by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 29 November 2018 and revised by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 26 May 2025) lays down the present rules for the discussion and decision of party membership matters, in accordance with the Regulations on the Work of the Chinese Communist Party Group and the Regulations on the Approval of Competences and Procedures for the Punishment of Disciplinary Violations by the Chinese Communist Party. (b) To apply the spirit of reform and strict criteria to govern the party, to ensure that the party group (including the party committee of its nature, together with the other party members) is fully accountable to the party ' s principals, to strengthen the monitoring role of the monitoring and oversight bodies (hereinafter referred to as the accredited bodies) and to promote a culture of discipline and anti-corruption with a strict tone, strict measures and strict atmosphere. Article 3 imposes party disciplinary sanctions on members of the party ' s group management, and the inspection and inspection committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) appointed by the party ' s team, the disciplinary committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) and the accredited body, among others, shall perform their duties in accordance with the established competencies and procedures, enhance coordination and communication, establish an orderly and smooth line of communication and work together to achieve political, disciplinary and social coherence. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.
